events.name: HERO_MOVE
events.description: Emits UI:{heroMoveEvent} with { heroId, toX, toY }

events.name: FEATURE_ENTER
events.description: Emits UI:{featureEnterEvent} with { heroId, feature, hex }

events.name: ADVANCE_TURN
events.description: Emits UI:{advanceTurnEvent} with {} when the player passes the turn without moving

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Called when all enemies or all player heroes are defeated

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Allow Move All Heroes
overridableConfigKeys.description: Allow selecting / moving ALL heroes (including enemy). For testing.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Asset Manifest
overridableConfigKeys.description: Direct asset manifest — takes priority over entity-derived manifest.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Diamond Top Y
overridableConfigKeys.description: Y pixel offset to the top diamond vertex of the isometric grid.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enable Camera
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable pan/zoom camera. Set false for fixed maps where overlay labels need stable positions.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: World features seeded into entity on INIT.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial tile map seeded into entity on INIT — passable drives movement validation in the model.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial hero/unit roster seeded into entity on INIT — team+health drive win/lose conditions.
